title: Define EasyEffects audio profiles
goal: Stabilize existing EasyEffects usage into named audio profiles for calls, recording and monitoring rather than ad-hoc audio tweaks.

acceptance.assertion: Current PipeWire/EasyEffects presence and preset paths are recorded.
Profiles for calls, recording and neutral monitoring are defined or the blocking audio prerequisite is documented.
Preset backup/export is documented so audio changes are reversible.

metadata.source_request: Evaluate every interesting utility tool and register the resulting plan in Bureau.
validation: Service smoke on 2026-07-09 reported Backrest 200, Beszel 200, Stirling PDF 200 and Paperless 302.
Paperless README accidental import was removed; final Paperless counts are documents=1, tags=17, document_types=12, correspondents=13.
Paperless export command heim-paperless-export completed successfully at 2026-07-09T10:55:25+02:00.
Local restic utility backup command heim-restic-backup-local completed successfully and produced snapshot b9332c01 at 2026-07-09 10:55:28.
Systemd user timers heim-paperless-export.timer and heim-restic-backup-local.timer are enabled with next runs on 2026-07-10.
LocalSend inbox and Paperless consume handoff paths exist: ~/Incoming/LocalSend and ~/Incoming/LocalSend/paperless-consume.
EasyEffects profile planning evidence exists at ~/.local/share/heim-utilities/easyeffects/profile-plan.md; no profile was blindly activated.
Beszel HTTP smoke returned 200 and database has users=1 and _externalAuths=1, but systems=0, system_stats=0 and container_stats=0.
EasyEffects presence and preset/config paths were recorded.
Profile families for Focal Clear MG output and Rode NT1-A input were defined in the profile plan.
Profile activation and subjective quality remain explicitly outside this verification and require listening/recording validation.
metadata.runtime_evidence: heimgewebe/infra runtime/local-utility-endstate-2026-07-09.md and heimgewebe/heim-pc runtime/software-inventory.md after utility end-state refresh
